{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Visiri courier
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Visiri courier]] with blood-red skin delivered a massive crate.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
